description_long: This object is a small, cylindrical plastic medicine bottle with a pointed nozzle tip, commonly used for dispensing liquid medications such as eye drops or ear drops. The bottle features a ribbed, screw-on cap that tapers to a narrow spout, designed for precise application. Around the body of the bottle is a blue label with white text, partially legible as 'ReViSi[on]', and a circular emblem beneath the text. The bottle is primarily white and gray, with the blue label wrapping around most of its circumference. A black ring is visible at the base of the cap, possibly serving as a tamper-evident feature. The overall design is compact and portable, suitable for carrying in a pocket or small bag.
description: A small white plastic medicine bottle with a pointed nozzle, blue label, and ribbed screw cap, likely for dispensing liquid medication.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from the side, showing the ribbed cap, pointed nozzle, and a partial view of the blue label.
description_view_1: The front view displays the blue label with the most legible text 'ReViSi[on]' and a circular emblem beneath it.
description_view_2: This angle shows the label wrapping further around the bottle, with the text 'sion' visible and the emblem partially obscured.
description_view_3: The back side of the bottle is visible, showing mostly the plain white plastic with only the edge of the blue label in view.
